nodes.label: F1 memorization gap — MNIST (Phase 1 headline)
nodes.rationale: Train/held-out accuracy vs supervised epochs: block held-out 0.85/train ~0.875 (gap +0.027) vs pure-GD held-out ~0.94/train ~1.0 (gap +0.062), disjoint shaded gap regions. This is the phase's headline number — block generalizes more honestly at ~10% backward cost — embedded verbatim in phase1-report.md as the exp1 thesis result.
